hooks.command: if [ ! -f .claude/security-review-passed ]; then echo 'Security review required. Run /security-review before creating a PR.' >&2; exit 2; fi; REVIEW_SHA=$(cat .claude/security-review-passed | tr -d '[:space:]'); HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD); if [ "$REVIEW_SHA" != "$HEAD_SHA" ]; then echo "Security review is stale (reviewed $REVIEW_SHA, HEAD is now $HEAD_SHA). Run /security-review again." >&2; exit 2; fi
